case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. DEXTER K LEONG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-01-2008 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LEONG, DEXTER K DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-01-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-17-2008

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-18-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEONG, DEXTER K $11,843.49 PRINCIPAL, $413.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,257.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-28-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. SERVED MAR-18-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEONG, DEXTER K
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $413.82 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEONG, DEXTER K
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: WAIVER OF ATTYS'. FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.
DECLARATION OF KRISTEN HALL RE: CCP 585(D); INTEREST ACCRUED AFTER BREACH OF CONTRACT-(CC3289) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE
